author: Besting
text: REVISED 2026-06-06: a fresh landing's substrate is SEEDED by copying the app-level default-config/ folder into balls/config (not hand-built defaults). The seed carries tracker/delivery/builtin plugin wiring, so they are ordinary landing entries — no runtime plugin defaults. (Seed mechanism itself = new sibling task; this task just creates the landing/store branches + binding and invokes the seed.) spec bl-2e26 §1/§12.
